axial_flip_cycle.description: The Material Planet flips its axis every 73 days because of asymmetrical doom scars.

cross_calendar_conversion.standard_runtime_day_count: Runtime ledgers use sequential day-of-year numbers while preserving civilization-local labels.
cross_calendar_conversion.policy: Civilization calendars are preserved natively; conversion objects exist for cross-polity retrieval, not to erase local systems.

celestial_visibility_rules.paired_moons: Only one of Talalmany’s paired moons is visible at a time.
celestial_visibility_rules.aurora_trigger_note: Aurora Meadows intensify when the Fey Moon is nearest the Yellow Mountains in Principalities material.

observance_collision_rules.rule: When local festivals, celestial events, and heavy legal traffic coincide, administrative institutions expand staffing rather than erasing observance pressure.

justification: Repository synthesis layer built to make strongly supported canon operational without overriding source truth.
